name: setFlagArt
description: Shows or hides constellation artwork (mythological figures and cultural art). When enabled, artistic representations of constellations are displayed over the star patterns.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show constellation art, false to hide

name: getFlagArt
description: Returns whether constellation artwork is currently visible.
returnDescription: true if constellation art is visible, false if hidden

name: setArtFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for constellation artwork when appearing or disappearing. Controls how smoothly the art transitions between visible and hidden states.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Fade duration in seconds (0 = instant, 2 = slow fade)

name: getArtFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for constellation artwork in seconds.
example:
var fadeDuration = ConstellationMgr.getArtFadeDuration();
core.debug("Artwork fade duration: " + fadeDuration);

name: setArtIntensity
description: Sets the maximum intensity (brightness/opacity) of constellation artwork. Values range from 0 (fully transparent) to 1 (fully opaque). The intensity also fades based on field of view settings.

parameters.name: intensity
parameters.description: Art intensity value between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getArtIntensity
description: Returns the current maximum intensity (brightness/opacity) of constellation artwork.
example:
var intensity = ConstellationMgr.getArtIntensity();
core.debug("Current art intensity: " + intensity);

name: setArtIntensityMinimumFov
description: Sets the lower bound on the field of view (FOV) at which the art intensity fades to zero. Below this FOV, artwork becomes fully transparent.

parameters.name: fov
parameters.description: Minimum FOV in degrees (default: 1.0)

name: getArtIntensityMinimumFov
description: Returns the lower bound FOV at which artwork intensity fades to zero.

name: setArtIntensityMaximumFov
description: Sets the upper bound on the field of view (FOV) at which the art intensity reaches its maximum value (set by setArtIntensity).

parameters.name: fov
parameters.description: Maximum FOV in degrees (default: 2.0)

name: getArtIntensityMaximumFov
description: Returns the upper bound FOV at which artwork intensity reaches maximum.

name: setBoundariesColor
description: Sets the color of constellation boundaries (the official IAU constellation borders).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getBoundariesColor
description: Returns the current color of constellation boundaries.
example:
var color = ConstellationMgr.getBoundariesColor();
core.debug("Boundaries color: RGB" + color);

name: setFlagBoundaries
description: Shows or hides constellation boundaries (the official IAU constellation borders).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show boundaries, false to hide

name: getFlagBoundaries
description: Returns whether constellation boundaries are visible.
returnDescription: true if boundaries are visible, false if hidden

name: setBoundariesFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for constellation boundaries when they appear or disappear.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Fade duration in seconds

name: getBoundariesFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for constellation boundaries.

name: setBoundariesThickness
description: Sets the thickness of constellation boundary lines in pixels.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: Boundary thickness in pixels (minimum 1)

name: getBoundariesThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of constellation boundary lines.

name: setFlagIsolateSelected
description: Enables or disables isolation mode for selected constellations. When enabled, only selected constellations are shown; all others are hidden.

parameters.name: isolate
parameters.description: true to enable isolation mode, false to disable

name: getFlagIsolateSelected
description: Returns whether isolation mode for selected constellations is active.
returnDescription: true if isolation mode is active

name: setFlagConstellationPick
description: Sets whether only one selected constellation should be displayed at a time when isolation mode is active. When enabled, selecting a new constellation replaces the previous selection.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: true for single selection mode, false for multiple selection

name: getFlagConstellationPick
description: Returns whether single constellation pick mode is enabled.
returnDescription: true if single pick mode is enabled

name: setLinesColor
description: Sets the color of constellation lines that connect stars to form the constellation patterns.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getLinesColor
description: Returns the current color of constellation lines.
example:
var color = ConstellationMgr.getLinesColor();
core.debug("Lines color: RGB" + color);

name: setFlagLines
description: Shows or hides constellation lines that connect stars to form the official IAU constellation patterns.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show constellation lines, false to hide

name: getFlagLines
description: Returns whether constellation lines are visible.
returnDescription: true if lines are visible, false if hidden

name: setLinesFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for constellation lines when they appear or disappear.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Fade duration in seconds

name: getLinesFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for constellation lines.

name: setConstellationLineThickness
description: Sets the thickness of constellation lines in pixels.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: Line thickness in pixels (minimum 1)

name: getConstellationLineThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of constellation lines in pixels.

name: setLabelsColor
description: Sets the color of constellation labels (names).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getLabelsColor
description: Returns the current color of constellation labels.

name: setFlagLabels
description: Shows or hides constellation labels (names).

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show labels, false to hide

name: getFlagLabels
description: Returns whether constellation labels are visible.
returnDescription: true if labels are visible, false if hidden

name: setLabelsFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for constellation labels when they appear or disappear.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Fade duration in seconds

name: getLabelsFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for constellation labels.

name: setFontSize
description: Sets the font size used for displaying constellation names on screen.

parameters.name: newFontSize
parameters.description: Font size in pixels (recommended: 12-24)

name: getFontSize
description: Returns the current font size for constellation names in pixels.

name: setFlagHulls
description: Shows or hides constellation hulls (convex hull areas outlining each constellation's region). Useful for visualizing constellation boundaries in a different way.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show hulls, false to hide

name: getFlagHulls
description: Returns whether constellation hulls are visible.
returnDescription: true if hulls are visible, false if hidden

name: setHullsColor
description: Sets the color of constellation hulls (convex hull areas that outline each constellation's region on the sky).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getHullsColor
description: Returns the current color of constellation hulls.

name: setHullsFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for constellation hulls when they appear or disappear.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Fade duration in seconds

name: getHullsFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for constellation hulls.

name: setHullsThickness
description: Sets the thickness of constellation hull lines in pixels.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: Hull thickness in pixels (minimum 1)

name: getHullsThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of constellation hull lines.

name: setZodiacColor
description: Sets the color of zodiac lines (if defined in the current sky culture). The zodiac represents the path of the Sun through the constellations.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getZodiacColor
description: Returns the current color of zodiac lines.

name: setFlagZodiac
description: Shows or hides the zodiac lines (if defined in the current sky culture). The zodiac is a band of constellations along the ecliptic path.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show zodiac, false to hide

name: getFlagZodiac
description: Returns whether zodiac lines are visible.
returnDescription: true if zodiac is visible, false if hidden

name: setZodiacFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for zodiac lines when they appear or disappear.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Fade duration in seconds

name: getZodiacFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for zodiac lines.

name: setZodiacThickness
description: Sets the thickness of zodiac lines in pixels.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: Line thickness in pixels (minimum 1)

name: getZodiacThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of zodiac lines.

name: setLunarSystemColor
description: Sets the color of lunar system lines (lunar mansions or stations) if defined in the current sky culture.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: getLunarSystemColor
description: Returns the current color of lunar system lines.

name: setFlagLunarSystem
description: Shows or hides lunar system lines (lunar mansions or stations) if defined in the current sky culture.

parameters.name: displayed
parameters.description: true to show lunar system, false to hide

name: getFlagLunarSystem
description: Returns whether lunar system lines are visible.
returnDescription: true if lunar system is visible, false if hidden

name: setLunarSystemFadeDuration
description: Sets the fade duration for lunar system lines when they appear or disappear.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Fade duration in seconds

name: getLunarSystemFadeDuration
description: Returns the current fade duration for lunar system lines.

name: setLunarSystemThickness
description: Sets the thickness of lunar system lines in pixels.

parameters.name: thickness
parameters.description: Line thickness in pixels (minimum 1)

name: getLunarSystemThickness
description: Returns the current thickness of lunar system lines.

name: deselectConstellations
description: Deselects all constellations. If isolation mode is active, all constellations will be hidden.

name: selectAllConstellations
description: Selects all constellations in the sky. When isolation mode is enabled, all constellations become visible (same effect as disabling isolation).

name: selectConstellation
description: Selects a constellation by its English name. Automatically enables isolation mode if not already active.

parameters.name: englishName
parameters.description: English name of the constellation (e.g., 'Orion', 'Ursa Major', 'Taurus', 'Leo')

name: selectConstellationByObjectName
description: Selects the constellation where a celestial body (planet, star, etc.) is located. Automatically enables isolation mode if not already active.

parameters.name: englishName
parameters.description: English name of the celestial body (e.g., 'Venus', 'Sirius', 'Mars', 'Jupiter')

name: deselectConstellation
description: Removes a specific constellation from the selected list. If this was the only selected constellation and isolation mode is active, all constellations become hidden.

parameters.name: englishName
parameters.description: English name of the constellation to deselect

name: getConstellationsEnglishNames
description: Returns a list of English names for all constellations in the currently loaded sky culture.

name: getIAUconstellationName
description: Static method that returns the full IAU constellation name for a given three-letter abbreviation.

parameters.name: abbreviation
parameters.description: Three-letter IAU constellation abbreviation (e.g., 'Ori', 'UMa', 'Leo')

name: outputHullAreas
description: Writes constellation hull areas to a CSV file in the Stellarium user data directory. Useful for developers analyzing constellation coverage.

parameters.name: fileNamePrefix
parameters.description: Prefix for the output CSV file (default: 'hullAreas')

compatibility.notes: Development utility - may change in future versions

example:
ConstellationMgr.outputHullAreas("my_hull_analysis");
core.debug("Hull areas exported to user data directory");

name: starsInHullOf
signature: starsInHullOf(QString englishName, bool hipOnly, float maxMag, QString fileNamePrefix)
description: Creates a CSV file listing all stars within the convex hull of a specified constellation. Useful for astronomical data analysis.

parameters.name: englishName
parameters.description: English name of the constellation (e.g., 'Orion', 'Ursa Major')

parameters.name: hipOnly
parameters.description: If true, only list Hipparcos catalog stars

parameters.name: maxMag
parameters.description: Maximum magnitude to include (default: 25.0)

parameters.name: fileNamePrefix
parameters.description: Prefix for the output CSV file (default: 'hullStars')

compatibility.notes: Development utility - may change in future versions
